warnings: Risk action only: broker execution must verify currently held shares before order placement.

reasons: Market Breadth Collapse: Equal-weight S&P (RSP) is significantly underperforming Cap-weight (SPY). Rally is fragile.
Macro Regime: Panic. No dip-buying until fear and breadth recover.
